main.name: Rafianto Adhi Sampurno
main.bio: Frontend Developer passionate about building responsive, user-friendly, and modern web applications using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and React.js. Currently pursuing a Double Degree in Information Systems and Accounting at BINUS University while continuously improving frontend development skills through real-world projects and continuous learning.
